hints.text: British overseas territory north of the Caribbean — **counts as UK** in country streaks; drives on the **left**
**Black Street View car** w/ the entire front sides typically visible
Typical look: fairly dense vegetation of **small trees + many bushes**, single-family houses strewn across; **palms** very common; the ocean is never far and looks distinctly **light blue**
Plates **all-white, fairly long**, black digits bunched in the middle
Most roads: **single solid yellow middle line, NO outer lines**; occasional white **zig-zag lines**
hints.uniq_note: Left-hand traffic + lone yellow centre line is a Bermuda signature.

hints.text: **Pastel stone houses w/ completely WHITE roofs** (stepped, for rain catchment)
**Hamilton**: by far the largest town — dense multi-floor downtown
**NW tip** (Royal Naval Dockyard): many large **unpainted grey-brick buildings**
**Boat trekker** on the east coast: around Saint George's Harbour + past Fort St. Catherine (NE tip)
